failedAssertions.reason: Round 2 re-test confirms same failure as round 1. Session Recordings section structure is correct (heading, grid, 4 labeled cards with correct scenario-persona names). Zero <video> elements in DOM — all replaced by error divs with 'Video unavailable' text. Root cause: 37-byte mock .webm placeholder files are invalid WebM containers. Feature fix-mock-webm-files (still pending) must produce valid minimal WebM files (200+ bytes).

frictions.description: Mock .webm files are 37 bytes (EBML header only, no Segment/Track elements). Browsers cannot decode them, triggering HTML5 media error events. The video component's onError handler replaces <video> elements with 'Video unavailable' error divs.
